en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Certificate of Incorporation in the Japan Entity Documentation Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

In Japan, the Certificate of Incorporation is an essential document used to verify a company’s legal registration. This certificate is required to confirm a business’s legitimate existence and its authority to enter contracts, conduct transactions, and complete formal compliance processes.
\nThe Certificate of Incorporation can be obtained from the Legal Affairs Bureau offices throughout Japan, or requested online through the official Ministry of Justice electronic registration and certificate issuance system.
Please upload your Certificate of Incorporation issued within the last 3 months.
Please enter the issue date of your Certificate of Incorporation.
